case_title: FOSTER GRAHAM MILSTEIN & CALISHER, LLP VS. GUARDIAN CAPITAL ADVISORS, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOSTER GRAHAM MILSTEIN & CALISHER, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT GUARDIAN CAPITAL ADVISORS, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOSTER GRAHAM MILSTEIN & CALISHER, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT GUARDIAN CAPITAL ADVISORS, INC. OEX HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2018 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION & ORDER FOR APPEARANCE & EXAMINATION; REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE (TRANSACTION ID # 61904988) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOSTER GRAHAM MILSTEIN & CALISHER, LLP SERVED FEB-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUARDIAN CAPITAL ADVISORS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOSTER GRAHAM MILSTEIN & CALISHER, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUARDIAN CAPITAL ADVISORS, INC. $10,812.22 PRINCIPAL, $410.86 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,593.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
